phases.name: Core OS Hardening and Methodology
objectives: Finalize Orchestrator V2 and file-based state bus (.agents/inbox, active, review, logs)
Harden LLM Factory routing (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama)
Perfect the Scaffolder for self-replicating workspaces
Implement comprehensive error handling and retry logic
Achieve complete test coverage for core components
Improve methodology by integrating Atomic-Agents framework to build examples

phases.name: Agentic UI Widgets
objectives: Design decoupled UI architecture for State Atoms
Implement State Publisher to stream JSON state updates
Create standalone Vanilla JS widgets (e.g., BudgetWidget)
Connect UI widgets to the OS State Bus
